statusMeanings.FAIL: check failed or required release state is unsafe
statusMeanings.SKIP: available local check was not run in this dashboard invocation
statusMeanings.SIMULATED: synthetic or dry-run proof exists, but it is not production proof
statusMeanings.HUMAN_REQUIRED: operator-observed or signed proof is required outside this dashboard
statusMeanings.MANUAL: gated smoke or operator step requiring explicit context
statusMeanings.INFO: release context or non-runtime safety note

statements: SIMULATED evidence is not production proof.
Dashboard PASS alone is not sufficient release evidence.
Skipped dashboard checks must remain visible and cannot be treated as PASS.
This report does not claim production-at-scale readiness.

blockers.title: Disaster recovery
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Human-observed restore drill evidence with sanitized RPO/RTO and post-restore checks.
forbiddenProofTypes: simulated restore proof represented as completed disaster recovery
template-only validation represented as completed restore evidence
real PII or raw credit reports
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Use simulated proof only for autonomous guard coverage; human operator still must perform a restore drill and provide sanitized signed evidence.

blockers.title: Production ingest runtime
blockers.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED worker queue-drain proof exists and a default-off production-scoped bounded activation plan is guarded by tests; actual production activation and queue-depth evidence are still required before production-fixed status.
forbiddenProofTypes: production queue mutation without explicit production apply guards
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep production worker execution default-off; use dry-run first, then only run bounded production apply after explicit operator approval and record queue-depth before/after evidence.

blockers.title: Load/concurrency proof
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe load evidence with synthetic fixtures, throughput, latency, queue depth, packet PDF cache, DB pool, rate limiter, dashboard references, and zero provider calls.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED load represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
measured evidence against a production host
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run the bounded measured local or staging-safe baseline with synthetic fixtures and release-blocking thresholds; keep production load forbidden.

blockers.title: Packet PDF scaling
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that packet PDF cache misses are bounded by a synchronous envelope with duplicate collapse, timeout, overload failure evidence, send-route provider-free failure, cache hit behavior, invalidation behavior, and non-owner denial.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/packet-pdf-cache.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED cache-miss proof represented as production-at-scale proof
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the bounded synchronous envelope evidence current; collect staged target-environment capacity evidence before making any production-at-scale claim.

blockers.title: Ingest cleanup/data safety
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that default failed-ingest cleanup is non-destructive, marks remediation-required state, preserves artifacts/tradelines/evidence, and keeps any retained destructive path explicitly confirmed and production-refusing.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the retained destructive helper classified as guarded residual risk: it is not default, requires explicit confirmation, records lifecycle evidence, and refuses production-like environments.

blockers.title: Historical raw report bytes
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Sanitized non-destructive inventory, dry-run remediation plan, and accepted operator remediation evidence for old inline rows while new rows stay reference-based.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw base64, raw report text, PII, secrets, signed URLs, or database URLs in evidence
dry-run plan represented as completed remediation
operator acceptance without approval, backup acknowledgement, compatibility checks, and post-remediation counts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Use the sanitized inventory and dry-run plan to run a separately approved operator remediation process, then submit sanitized acceptance evidence before classifying this blocker fixed.

blockers.title: Bureau communication storage
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Automated storage adapter proof for new bureau attachments plus compatibility proof for old inline records.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw attachment bytes in DB evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep list endpoints metadata-only and handle any legacy inline rows through an approved historical remediation plan.

blockers.title: Response operations maturity
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Operator-ready evidence for disabled live scheduler, backfill readiness, purge/archive readiness, dashboard/soak references, manual fallback, and unresolved alerting risk without enabling live operations.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep live scheduler default-off and use response ops readiness evidence to govern scheduler, backfill, purge/archive, dashboard, soak, and manual fallback controls without mutating production.

blockers.title: Observability/alerting
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Sanitized dashboard metrics plus SIMULATED external alert dry-run/mock proof now exist; live external alert proof or accepted exclusion remains required for operations.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED alert proof represented as live alert delivery
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep live external alerting disabled unless separately configured and proven; use this dry-run plus an accepted exclusion if no provider is used.

blockers.title: Migration governance
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted non-mutating migration gate policy evidence. Existing runtime ensure residuals are policy-waived only while the gate blocks unknown, missing, unledgered, or unapproved mutation sources.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-checker.spec.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-gate.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: policy closure without release-blocking mode or formal waiver
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep migrations:gate non-mutating, attach latest migration gate evidence to promotion decisions, and convert runtime ensure residuals to reviewed additive migration ledger entries one workstream at a time.

blockers.title: Production deployment parity
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Workflow unit tests, read-only production-safe probe evidence, local/staging synthetic owner-denial evidence, default-off production worker path evidence, and human-observed production evidence; rollback proof remains incomplete.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep production probes read-only, keep seeded privacy smokes local/staging-only, and collect separate rollback plus approved production worker dry-run/apply evidence before calling deployment parity complete.

blockers.title: OCR route-local validation shape
blockers.proofTypeRequired: OCR shared upload-validation proof plus valid-fixture output-stability evidence.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep OCR validation aligned with shared upload boundaries and preserve valid PDF extraction output in regression tests.

blockers.title: Parser-test list sensitive field
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only parser-test list proof plus admin-only raw text detail/export proof.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw extracted text in list evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep parser-test list metadata-only; use admin-only get/export paths for raw extracted text workflows and keep UI detail hydration covered by tests.

blockers.title: Consumer signature list sensitive field
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only consumer-signature list proof plus owner/admin get-by-id signature data proof.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: signature image data in list evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep signature list metadata-only; use owner/admin get-by-id detail when signature image data is required.

blockers.title: Hidden-risk list semantics
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Design/evidence artifact for hidden-risk aggregate and stale-suppression semantics; full bounded pagination remains a separate UI/query task.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Split hidden-risk aggregate counts from paginated rows in a separate design task; do not apply a blind limit that changes aggregate semantics.

blockers.title: DB pool pressure evidence
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record DB pool configured max, observed active/borrowed signal or explicit unavailable reason, latency, queue depth, dashboard references, and zero production DB targeting.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/runtime-tuning-config.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED DB pool signal represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
production database target in measured evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe load and record sanitized DB pool configured/observed signals or an explicit unavailable reason.

blockers.title: Rate limiter write pressure
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record bounded synthetic rate limiter accepted/rejected counts, write-pressure events, latency, zero real identifiers, and zero production mutation.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED pressure represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe rate-limit pressure using synthetic identifiers only; do not send production hostile traffic.

blockers.title: Runtime-size gates
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Runtime-size report plus accepted policy acceptance evidence. Warning-only closure must be an explicit formal waiver with governed WARN/WAIVED rows; hard-gate closure must have no exceeded thresholds.
forbiddenProofTypes: WARN rows without remediation owner/date or waiver reason
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the warning-only waiver evidence current, and only enable a hard gate through a later reviewed threshold-policy change.

blockers.title: Heavy PDF/OCR dependencies
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Policy-bound WARN/WAIVED baseline for heavy PDF/OCR dependencies plus OCR deterministic regression proof for any future dependency or Docker package change.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep heavy PDF/OCR dependency size warnings visible; defer dependency isolation or replacement until a separately tested OCR/PDF/parser task.

blockers.title: Production-safe privacy probe depth
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Local/staging synthetic owner-denial proof plus human-observed read-only production probe evidence. Synthetic owner-denial is not production mutation proof.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run read-only production-safe probes and local/staging synthetic owner-denial smoke; do not create production fixtures for deeper owner-denial proof.

blockers.title: Ingest observability release gating
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Release evidence capture records exact commands, production worker readiness evidence, dashboard skips, and explicit dashboard-PASS limitations.
forbiddenProofTypes: release gate changes in this framework
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep exact release evidence commands visible in production-scale evidence, production worker readiness evidence, response ops readiness evidence, alert exclusion validation, promotion pack output, and operator dashboard semantics; dashboard PASS alone is not release evidence.

blockers.title: Retention archive/restore proof
blockers.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED retention archive/restore lifecycle proof exists, but human-observed physical archive/restore lifecycle evidence remains required.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED retention proof represented as physical archive/restore completion
physical purge represented as recoverable without proof
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Use SIMULATED proof only for autonomous guard coverage; complete human-observed physical archive/restore lifecycle evidence before any production recoverability claim.

blockers.title: Public routes inventory risk
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Executable route auth contract proof that public legacy handlers remain classified, retired public routes stay reset/410, and public inventory changes require explicit test updates.
forbiddenProofTypes: public route behavior change without contract
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep route auth contract strict, pin the public inventory, and fail on retired public route revival or unclassified endpoint drift.

blockers.title: Documentation drift
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Promotion pack and registry evidence must detect stale audit/tracker commit references and keep blocker data aligned with the controlling audit before promotion.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run the promotion pack after each scoped blocker task, use its stale-reference findings, and align tracker/audit/evidence references before any promotion decision.

blockers.title: Dashboard default SKIP semantics
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Dashboard and promotion-pack reports distinguish PASS, FAIL, SKIP, SIMULATED, and HUMAN_REQUIRED while recording exact commands, skipped checks, and dashboard PASS limitation.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep release evidence labeled by exact commands and visible SKIP/SIMULATED/HUMAN_REQUIRED rows, not dashboard headline status; promotion pack validation must fail if SKIP is treated as PASS.

allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Split hidden-risk aggregate counts from paginated rows in a separate design task; do not apply a blind limit that changes aggregate semantics.

unresolvedBlockers.title: DB pool pressure evidence
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record DB pool configured max, observed active/borrowed signal or explicit unavailable reason, latency, queue depth, dashboard references, and zero production DB targeting.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/runtime-tuning-config.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED DB pool signal represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
production database target in measured evidence
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe load and record sanitized DB pool configured/observed signals or an explicit unavailable reason.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Rate limiter write pressure
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record bounded synthetic rate limiter accepted/rejected counts, write-pressure events, latency, zero real identifiers, and zero production mutation.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED pressure represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe rate-limit pressure using synthetic identifiers only; do not send production hostile traffic.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Runtime-size gates
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Runtime-size report plus accepted policy acceptance evidence. Warning-only closure must be an explicit formal waiver with governed WARN/WAIVED rows; hard-gate closure must have no exceeded thresholds.
forbiddenProofTypes: WARN rows without remediation owner/date or waiver reason
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the warning-only waiver evidence current, and only enable a hard gate through a later reviewed threshold-policy change.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Heavy PDF/OCR dependencies
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Policy-bound WARN/WAIVED baseline for heavy PDF/OCR dependencies plus OCR deterministic regression proof for any future dependency or Docker package change.
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep heavy PDF/OCR dependency size warnings visible; defer dependency isolation or replacement until a separately tested OCR/PDF/parser task.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Production-safe privacy probe depth
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Local/staging synthetic owner-denial proof plus human-observed read-only production probe evidence. Synthetic owner-denial is not production mutation proof.
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run read-only production-safe probes and local/staging synthetic owner-denial smoke; do not create production fixtures for deeper owner-denial proof.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Retention archive/restore proof
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: SIMULATED retention archive/restore lifecycle proof exists, but human-observed physical archive/restore lifecycle evidence remains required.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED retention proof represented as physical archive/restore completion
physical purge represented as recoverable without proof
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Use SIMULATED proof only for autonomous guard coverage; complete human-observed physical archive/restore lifecycle evidence before any production recoverability claim.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Public routes inventory risk
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Executable route auth contract proof that public legacy handlers remain classified, retired public routes stay reset/410, and public inventory changes require explicit test updates.
forbiddenProofTypes: public route behavior change without contract
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep route auth contract strict, pin the public inventory, and fail on retired public route revival or unclassified endpoint drift.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Documentation drift
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Promotion pack and registry evidence must detect stale audit/tracker commit references and keep blocker data aligned with the controlling audit before promotion.
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run the promotion pack after each scoped blocker task, use its stale-reference findings, and align tracker/audit/evidence references before any promotion decision.
